title: Reinforced Deepslate Recipe
description: now craft your own reinforced deepslate
body:
🦴 Reinforced Deepslate Recipe Datapack  
Craft the ancient city’s core—no Warden required!  
This datapack introduces a custom recipe for Reinforced Deepslate, letting players access this unbreakable block through survival-friendly means.

✨ Features  
✅ Shaped recipe using 6 Bone Blocks + 3 Deepslate
🧩 Lore-friendly integration with ancient city and bone-based rituals  
🔁 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and expansion  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.19+
